title: SimpleLegal Matter
description: Schema representing a legal matter in the SimpleLegal ELM platform.

practice_area.description: Legal practice area (e.g., Litigation, IP, Employment, Contract).

client.description: Internal client or business unit for the matter.

lead_attorney.description: Primary attorney responsible for the matter.

outside_counsel.description: Outside law firm handling the matter.

budget.description: Total budget allocated for the matter.

actual_spend.description: Total actual spend on the matter to date.

accruals.description: Accrued but unpaid costs for the matter.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the matter was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the matter was last updated.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values specific to the organization.
